title: Assam Spatial Data Repository System
description: Centralized platform for managing and serving geospatial datasets for Assam.
details: Building a scalable spatial data repository system enabling users to Browse, Request, and Download geospatial data, process and store them in PostGIS, and  Geoportal for visualization and analysis.
Implemented API-driven workflows for seamless data ingestion, layer management, and access control.
Integrated WMS services for real-time visualization and provided dataset download functionality.
Focused on performance optimization, structured data handling, and user-friendly interaction for managing large geospatial datasets.
Developed a responsive and user-friendly Geoportal for seamless interaction with geospatial data.
Integrated Tools in Geoportal - Buffer analysis, Measure distance and area, Draw and export data, Query Builder, Data Conversion, Search location, Print Etc...

title: Assam Nagaland Border Monitoring Portal
description: WebGIS system for monitoring and analyzing sensitive border regions.
details: Developed a WebGIS-based monitoring platform integrating multiple administrative and Temporal layers for spatial analysis.
Enabled real-time map visualization, feature inspection, and layer-based filtering to support monitoring workflows.
Implemented efficient GeoServer WMS rendering and optimized spatial queries using PostGIS.
Designed the system to support decision-making by providing clear, interactive insights into geospatial data.

title: GatiShakti API Integration
description: Integration of infrastructure datasets using external geospatial APIs.
details: Developed API to Serve infrastructure-related departmental datasets of Assam to GatiShakti Portal.
Implemented robust API for data parsing.
